data.name: Kurotsuki
data.detailed_description:
Step into a dark, myth-inspired vision of medieval Japan.

You play as a masked warrior on a path of vengeance and redemption, hunting corrupted spirits and ancient beasts that haunt the land. Each battle tests your skill in fast, fluid slasher combat — every encounter a dance of blades and timing, while epic Souls-like bosses demand strategy and precision.

Beyond the fight, your choices can unlock intimate, fully consensual encounters with NPCs, either after defeating powerful foes or through player-initiated interactions.

The world is rich with folklore — shrines, whispers of yokai, and echoes of forgotten gods. Between combat and discovery, you’ll explore a fading world, its secrets, and the story behind the mask.

Fast, combo-based slasher combat with skill-driven encounters

Challenging Souls-like bosses that test timing and strategy

Stylized PS3-era visuals with an atmospheric, mythic tone

Optional, player-initiated adult scenes with NPCs, fully consensual

Mythology and folklore woven into exploration and narrative

data.short_description: An atmospheric action slasher in mythic medieval Japan. Hunt corrupted spirits, face challenging Souls-like bosses, and master fast, skill-based combat. Explore a world of folklore, uncover hidden secrets, and unlock intimate, fully consensual encounters shaped by your choices.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 （64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4130 or Core™ i5-3470 or AMD FX™-6100
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GT 1030 (DDR4) or AMD Radeon™ RX 550
  • DirectX: 版本：12
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 （64-bit）
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-4460 or AMD FX™-8300
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 (VRAM 3GB) or AMD Radeon™ RX 570 (VRAM 4GB)
  • DirectX: 版本：12

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 （64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4130 or Core™ i5-3470 or AMD FX™-6100
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GT 1030 (DDR4) or AMD Radeon™ RX 550
  • DirectX: Version 12
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 （64-bit）
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-4460 or AMD FX™-8300
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 (VRAM 3GB) or AMD Radeon™ RX 570 (VRAM 4GB)
  • DirectX: Version 12
